Null/missing = unknown/missing 

COMMENT: The U.S. Office of Management and Budget (OMB) defines metropolitan or micropolitan statistical 
areas based on published standards. The standards for defining the areas are reviewed and revised 
once every ten years, prior to each decennial census. Between censuses, the definitions are updated 
annually to reflect the most recent Census Bureau population estimates. The current definitions are as 
of August
